name: 法玛斯 | 半调水洗
descriptionEn: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. It has been custom painted with a blue and grey halftone splash pattern. Even the calmest waters can quickly change
descriptionZh: 给手头紧的玩家的一个廉价选择，法玛斯有效地填补了昂贵的步枪和杀伤力较低的微型冲锋枪之间的空缺。 这款定制涂装为蓝色和灰色的半色调泼溅图案。 即使最平静的水面也能瞬间掀起波澜
